sections.paragraph:
Original: בּשׁן

Transliteration: bâshân

Phonetic: baw-shawn'

BDB Definition:

Bashan = "fruitful"
  1. a district east of the Jordan known for its fertility which was given to the half-tribe of Manasseh

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
